description: MS — Market Structure signal research on 4H Kraken (526 coins)

experiments.name: Sprint 1 — 5 Market Structure Families
experiments.exit_mode: hybrid_notrl (DC TARGET + RSI RECOVERY + BB TARGET)
bugs_fixed: FVG/OB snapshot timing: snapshot after fill → snapshot before fill (0 trades → 295-548 trades)

experiments.name: Sprint 2 — Truth-Pass (Top-4 Robustness Validation)
experiments.exit_mode: hybrid_notrl (DC TARGET + RSI RECOVERY + BB TARGET)
tests: T2: Walk-Forward (2 splits, cal PF>=1.0 + test PF>=0.9)
T3: Bootstrap Monte Carlo (1000 resamples, P5_PF>=0.85, >=60% profitable)
experiments.status: GO — advance to paper trading validation
results: ms_018_mse_shallow (shift_pb): VERIFIED 3/3, PF=2.08, P5_PF=1.48, 100% boot prof, DD=21.3%
ms_005_msb_base (fvg_fill): VERIFIED 3/3, PF=1.65, P5_PF=1.19, 100% boot prof, DD=19.5%
ms_017_mse_fib618 (shift_pb): VERIFIED 3/3, PF=1.80, P5_PF=1.28, 100% boot prof, DD=28.0%
ms_007_msb_deep (fvg_fill): VERIFIED 3/3, PF=1.66, P5_PF=1.24, 99% boot prof, DD=22.9%

experiments.name: Sprint 3 — Ensemble Analysis (shift_pb + fvg_fill)
experiments.exit_mode: hybrid_notrl (DC TARGET + RSI RECOVERY + BB TARGET)
experiments.status: DECIDED — ms_018 standalone preferred over ensemble
results: ms_018+ms_005: VERIFIED PF=1.89 (vs 2.08 standalone), DD=24.2%, 454 trades
ms_018+ms_007: VERIFIED PF=1.55 (vs 2.08 standalone), DD=24.5%, 417 trades
ms_017+ms_005: VERIFIED PF=1.66 (vs 1.80 standalone), DD=21.9%, 445 trades
experiments.conclusion: Ensemble degrades ms_018 performance (-9% PF, -62% P&L). Low overlap (1.9-4.1%) confirms independent signals, but capital competition hurts. ms_018 standalone is optimal.

experiments.name: Sprint 4 — Paper Trading (MEXC 4H ms_018)
experiments.exit_mode: hybrid_notrl (DC TARGET + RSI RECOVERY + BB TARGET)
experiments.success_criteria: PF > 1.48 (P5 baseline), DD < 30%, WR > 35% after 50+ trades
